item.title: Armattan Marmotte 5 DJI Edition
item.description: The Armattan Marmotte is the culmination of everything that Armattan learned during the design process of their previous flagship multi-rotors. The design is clean and sturdy, the cage has been redesigned and is entirely in Titanium to protect your camera. This new frame is approx 115 grams, made of 4 mm carbon with a life time warranty on all Carbon Fiber and metal pieces! The tilting mechanism can be oriented to a low 10 degrees or so up to 90 degrees.
